S.FORM: Wally Anderzunas sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1946, ryax sa tay 11 nqu tay 1, Wally Anderzunas, squliq na p'unro. (mhuqil sa kawas tay 1989) cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: wallj an*erzunas~…ï s~…ïraral ƒßja î…£a s~…ïis~…ïjuw na nŒ≤a, wal malaxmis~…ïuq qanij la. kawas~…ï taj ****, rjax s~…ïa taj ** nqu taj *, wallj an*erzunas~…ï, s~…ïquliq na p îunro. (mƒßuqil s~…ïa kawas~…ï taj ****) ¶~ ®inkƒßulan s~…ïa knita î s~…ïa Œ≤rŒ≤iru î lis~…ïts~…ï o* national Œ≤as~…ïketŒ≤all as~…ïs~…ïo ¶~ ®iation plajers~…ï
S.FORM: Wally Anderzunas sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1946, ryax sa tay 11 nqu tay 1, Wally Anderzunas, squliq na p'unro. (mhuqil sa kawas tay 1989) cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
